written_description.description: Clear, human-readable summary of the media content.

embedding_description.description: Dense, keyword-rich description optimized for semantic search and vector embedding retrieval.

content_type.description: Detected type of the media content (e.g., lecture, article, conversation, podcast, image_description).

language.description: Primary language of the content as an ISO 639-1 code or language name (e.g., 'en', 'pt-BR').

key_topics.description: Main topics or themes present in the content.

complexity.description: Estimated complexity level of the content.
